daily.today_energy: Your intuition is absolutely *chef's kiss* today. Trust those gut feelings that hit different—they're basically your spiritual GPS recalibrating. Energy's inviting you to pause and actually listen to what your soul's been trying to tell you.
daily.love: Someone's vibes are shifting toward you in a way that feels genuine. Whether that's deepening a current connection or attracting fresh energy, stay open but don't force it. Real connection doesn't need convincing.
daily.career: Your creativity is speaking louder than usual—this is your moment to pitch that idea or approach a project differently. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower rn, so lean into what makes your work distinctly *you*.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more gentleness today. Whether that's rest, movement, or just being kinder to yourself mentally, honor that. Small acts of self-care compound into real transformation over time.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your zone of introspection this week, Pisces. It's giving major clarity moments mixed with some needed solo time. Trust the quiet—your intuition's basically screaming right now, so listen up.
weekly.love: Venus is softly nudging you toward authenticity in connections. Whether you're coupled or exploring, this is about showing up as your real self, not the filtered version. Vulnerability hits different when it's genuine.
weekly.career: Your creative channels are buzzing with potential energy. This week favors bold ideas and unconventional approaches, even if they feel a little outside the box. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower rn.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a bit overstimulated midweek—that's normal. Lean into grounding activities that feel nurturing: long showers, time near water, journaling. Your body's asking for softness, not intensity.
